proposed_field_values.proposed_value: Skilled nursing for wound care. Skilled nursing to perform daily Pack wound with iodoform gauze, ensuring loose packing to fill the wound bed without overpacking. Cleanse wound with normal saline. Wound measures approximately 10 cm depth X 3 cm width. Cover with appropriate sterile secondary dressing (e.g., dry gauze or ABD pad).
